Subject: Shipment not received for Order {orderId}

Hi {buyerName},

We're sorry you haven't received your order {orderId}. We've opened a non-shipment dispute and asked the seller to provide tracking within 72 hours.

If the seller cannot provide valid tracking, we will issue a full refund under our buyer protection policy.

Order details:
- Item: {title}
- Ordered: {orderDate}
- Amount: ${amount}

We'll update you within 72 hours.

Thanks,
BC Audio Support
